steps.title: Choose Your Boat
steps.desc: Browse our fleet and pick the vessel that fits your group size, license situation, and budget.

steps.title: Request a Quote
steps.desc: Fill in our quick form or call/WhatsApp us. We confirm availability and pricing within 2 hours.

steps.title: Safety Briefing
steps.desc: Arrive at the dock — we walk you through everything. Controls, navigation, anchoring, emergency procedures.

steps.title: Set Sail
steps.desc: The Aegean is yours. GPS on board, sea map provided, and our team available by phone throughout your day.
